input_regime.assumed_source_form: rho^(-1/2) (a(s) cos(varphi/2) + b(s) sin(varphi/2)) + higher terms

interpretation.meaning: This is the prototype rule for Pi_obs once the source has been reduced to its lower-root trace representation.
interpretation.not_a_claim: This does not construct the full PDE source projection or prove that every source reduces to this model without further work.
